HOME
OF
THE
BEST
MEAT
PIES
IN THE USA
In
1991
we
introduced
the
US to
the
Australian
Meat
Pie.
Today we offer over 23 varieties, and counting, of traditional and modern interpretations of the humble Aussie icon, along with other savory and sweet delicacies from Down-Under.
Our pies are all handmade and baked daily by Australia’s best qualified bakers, right here in
Marietta Georgia, and shipped fresh guaranteed all over the nation.

Hot Cross Bun Special (12) Traditional
Hot Cross Bun Special (12) Traditional
$33.99
Add to Cart:
Description
Details
Reviews
One dozen "fresh from the oven" traditional Hot Cross Buns with fruit shipped anywhere in the USA for $33.99 including shipping.
After a few days in transit they may need a little freshening up if you want to eat them straight away. So pop them into a warm oven (about 250’F) for 5 to 10 minutes.Thats all it takes to get them back to that just baked freshness. Please enjoy and have a great Easter!
709 Units in Stock
04/07/2020
jennifer c.
Delicious. Just like the hot cross buns i ate in UK in my younger days. Thank you so much.
Write Review
